title: Robust Spring Spanish Peaches Pa Amb Tomaquet
description: A funky spring Spanish dish featuring marinated peaches in a traditional pa amb tomaquet style, served in a donabe vessel, perfect for a brunch mood. This nut-free-friendly recipe is great for those looking for a unique and flavorful meal.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Slice the peaches into wedges and place them in a large bowl.
In a small bowl, whisk together olive oil, sherry vinegar, smoked paprika, and salt.
Pour the marinade over the peaches and toss to coat.
Let the peaches marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Slice the bread into 1-inch thick slices and toast until lightly browned.
Rub the toasted bread with garlic cloves.
Top the toasted bread with diced tomatoes, marinated peaches, and chopped fresh basil.
Serve the pa amb tomaquet in a donabe vessel.
Drizzle any remaining marinade over the top of the dish.
